---
title: "The masterclass series"
subtitle: "Standalone one-day AI masterclasses. Take any one on its own, or build a pathway."
toc: false
---

> **A common thread runs through all of them:** when everyone has access to the same AI, the generic output it produces is the baseline, not the advantage. What lasts is **human judgement**: knowing where AI genuinely helps, where it quietly fails, and where your thinking must stay in charge.

**The Human Edge** is part of Curtin University's Executive Education AI masterclasses. Each stands completely on its own; together they cover the full arc of working with AI in an organisation: **using and delivering** it well, deciding **where to invest**, and governing it **ethically**.

:::: {.callout-note}
All are searchable, with dates and enrolment, on the [Curtin Executive Education masterclasses page](https://www.curtin.edu.au/study/professional-development/executive-education/masterclasses/).
::::

:::: {.cards}

<div class="card-tile green">
<h3>① The Human Edge <span style="font-weight:600">(you are here)</span></h3>
<p><em>Using and Delivering AI with Judgement</em><br><br>
<strong>"When everyone has the same tools, where does my edge live?"</strong><br><br>
For professionals who want to use AI well and lead an AI initiative. The morning builds personal fluency (the trust tool, prompting, workflow redesign); the afternoon lifts the same judgement to delivering a project (the five differences, human-in-the-loop, the go/no-go). Combines individual practice and project delivery into one day.</p>
</div>

<div class="card-tile">
<h3>② AI in Strategy</h3>
<p><em>Choosing Where to Invest</em><br><br>
<strong>"Which AI investment is worth real money, and which is a confident-sounding trap?"</strong><br><br>
For executives, strategists and decision-makers. Leave with a scored, risk-assessed AI investment proposal ready to take to a sponsor.</p>
</div>

<div class="card-tile accent">
<h3>③ Ethics of Artificial Intelligence</h3>
<p><em>Predict, Prevent &amp; Manage the Risks</em><br><br>
<strong>"How do I avoid the ethical missteps, negative outcomes and public scandals that AI can cause?"</strong><br><br>
For anyone responsible for AI risk and governance. Informed by recent AI scandals and the field of AI ethics. Leave with a guidance toolkit and operational checklist customised to your own organisation.</p>
</div>

::::

## How they fit together

Each masterclass is a complete, standalone day. But they're designed to complement one another:

- **The Human Edge** (this course) builds the individual fluency *and* the project-delivery judgement the others draw on — from your first prompt to a project that ships.
- **AI in Strategy** decides *which* AI initiatives deserve investment.
- **Ethics of Artificial Intelligence** runs *across* all of them: the governance, risk and responsibility lens every AI initiative needs.

[Browse all masterclasses & enrol → Curtin Executive Education](https://www.curtin.edu.au/study/professional-development/executive-education/masterclasses/){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}
